path.description: A JSON Pointer path to a value in the state

SlotNode.description: Slot binding: Reference to a specific child node.

oneOf.description: Raw text content to render directly (e.g., 'Submit', 'Hello World').

content.description: Component payload. Can be raw literal text OR a structural node reference.

icon.description: The name of the icon from the Lucide icon library in kebab-case (e.g., 'chevron-right', 'user').

oneOf.description: Raw text content to render directly (e.g., 'Submit', 'Hello World').

title.description: Title of the item. Can be raw literal text OR a structural node reference.

className.description: Tailwind CSS classes for the component.
